value.found_quote: Select **User scope** to give the subagent a [persistent memory directory](#enable-persistent-memory) at `~/.claude/agent-memory/`. The subagent uses this to accumulate insights across conversations, such as codebase patterns and recurring issues.
value.rationale: The page describes a persistent memory directory feature for Claude Code subagents that accumulates insights across conversations, directly matching the claim. It is presented as a currently available feature with no indication of deprecation.
